title: aspidium falcatum
intro: Aspidium falcatum, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aspidium falcatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and other pains, and support respiratory health. Aspidium falcatum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
